title: hieracium arolae subsp. arolae
intro: Hieracium arolae subsp. arolae, also known as Hieracium arolae, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and pinnate leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Hieracium arolae subsp. arolae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Hieracium arolae subsp. arolae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
